differentials.name: positive rapid plasma reagin
differentials.raw: positive rapid plasma reagin (measures quantity of antibodies to assess new infection / efficacy of Rx)

differentials.name: positive microhemagglutination test for Treponema pallidum
differentials.raw: positive microhemagglutination test for Treponema pallidum (remains reactive for life)

differentials.name: Early phase ◊  Skeletal radiography abnormal in 19% of infected newborns without overt disease!
differentials.raw: Early phase ◊  Skeletal radiography abnormal in 19% of infected newborns without overt disease!

differentials.name: Spontaneous epiphyseal fractures causing Parrot pseudopalsy
differentials.raw: Spontaneous epiphyseal fractures causing Parrot pseudopalsy (DDx: battered child syndrome)

differentials.name: Hutchinson triad = dental abnormality, interstitial keratitis, 8th nerve deafness
differentials.raw: Hutchinson triad = dental abnormality, interstitial keratitis, 8th nerve deafness

context: ◊  Transplacental transmission cannot occur < 16 weeks gestational age √  pneumonia alba √  hepatomegaly Location:   symmetrical bilateral osteomyelitis involving multiple bones (HALLMARK) √  lucent metaphyseal band adjacent to thin / widened zone of provisional calcification ← disturbance in enchondral bone growth √  frayed edge of metaphyseal-physeal junction (osteochondritis) = erosions + lytic defects √  solid / lamellated periosteal new-bone growth = bone-within-bone appearance √  marginal destruction of spongiosa + cortex along side of shaft with widening of medullary canal (in short tub
